Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class SubjectModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
public class SubjectModel extends Object
JDBC Implementation of Subject Model to perform business logic and CRUD operations on the 'st_subject' database table. Handles mapping individual curricular subjects to their respective parental academic courses.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rays Vinay

    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    add(SubjectBean bean)
    Adds a new Subject record to the database after verifying that the subject name is unique and resolving its dependency details from CourseModel.

    Deletes a specific Subject record from the database using its primary key.

    Searches and filters Subject records dynamically based on provided criteria with built-in support for SQL pagination boundaries.

  • Constructor Details

    • SubjectModel

      public SubjectModel()

  • Method Details

    • nextPk

      public Integer nextPk() throws DatabaseException
      Generates the next automated Primary Key for the 'st_subject' table.
      Returns:
      the next available integer primary key
      Throws:
      DatabaseException - if a database access error occurs

    • add

      public long add(SubjectBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Adds a new Subject record to the database after verifying that the subject name is unique and resolving its dependency details from CourseModel.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object containing subject details to be inserted
      Returns:
      the generated primary key of the newly inserted record
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a database error or rollback failure occurs
      DuplicateRecordException - if a subject with the same name already exists

    • update

      public void update(SubjectBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Updates an existing Subject record in the database and refreshes its course dependency metadata context.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object containing updated subject data
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a database error or rollback failure occurs
      DuplicateRecordException - if target updates violate specific structural uniqueness

    • delete

      public void delete(SubjectBean bean) throws ApplicationException
      Deletes a specific Subject record from the database using its primary key.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object holding the ID of the subject to delete
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if a database error or rollback failure occurs

    • findByPk

      public SubjectBean findByPk(long pk) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and retrieves a Subject record using its primary key identifier.
      Parameters:
      pk - primary key identifier of the subject
      Returns:
      SubjectBean populated with record data, or null if no record is found
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while fetching the record

    • findByName

      public SubjectBean findByName(String name) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and retrieves a Subject record using its exact name match.
      Parameters:
      name - the unique name of the target subject
      Returns:
      SubjectBean populated with record data, or null if no record is found
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs while fetching the record

    • list

      public List<SubjectBean> list() throws ApplicationException
      Gets a complete list of all Subjects available in the database.
      Returns:
      a List containing all SubjectBeans
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs during retrieval

    • search

      public List<SubjectBean> search(SubjectBean bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
      Searches and filters Subject records dynamically based on provided criteria with built-in support for SQL pagination boundaries.
      Parameters:
      bean - data transfer object containing criteria values (id, name, course references, etc.)
      pageNo - current page number (starts at 1)
      pageSize - total number of records per page
      Returns:
      a List of filtered SubjectBeans matching the criteria
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs during search execution
